personalInfo.name: Hrishabh Tripathi
personalInfo.title: Azure Cloud Administrator | Infrastructure Specialist
personalInfo.summary: Azure Administrator with 3+ years of experience managing Azure infrastructure, implementing security policies, and optimizing cloud resources for enterprise environments. Expertise in Azure virtual machines, monitoring, and automation.

description: Managed Azure Cloud Services for infrastructure, provisioning virtual machines, storage accounts, and networking components
Utilized Azure Monitor for proactive monitoring of application health and performance metrics, ensuring rapid incident response
Optimized Azure virtual machine resource management, contributing to 25% improvement in system performance
Managed and resolved technical issues across Production, Integration, and Development environments
Implemented automation using PowerShell for recurring administrative tasks, saving over 90% of manual effort
Ensured continuous high availability and optimal system performance through Linux server management

projects.title: Azure Infrastructure Optimization
projects.description: Optimized Azure cloud infrastructure by implementing efficient resource management strategies, monitoring solutions, and automation scripts, resulting in improved performance and cost efficiency.

achievements.title: FY24 Q4 Champs Award
achievements.description: Received from DXC Technology Pvt Ltd for being one of the top performers
